Definition: specimen series code number (Düsseldorf collection) as printed in Table I col 1
Note: used for the printed row order; taxonomy applied later via ../_keys/Stephan/

Definition: species name as printed in Matano et al. 1985 Part I (Ventral pons)
Note: journal names kept (e.g. Lemur fulvus; Cebuella pygmaea; Avahi l. occidentalis); taxonomy applied later
Table I col 3 (Specimens); blank in print means 1
Table I col 4; re-used body weights (largely Stephan et al. 1981)

Definition: volume of the ventral pons in mm3
Note: Table I col 5 (VPo volume); the primary measured volume of Part I

Definition: Table I also prints size indices of VPo / neocortex / cerebellum, ratios VPo:NEO and VPo:CER, and VPo as % of brain stem. These are derived (allometric/relative) and are NOT transcribed here; recompute downstream with body weights from Stephan et al. 1981.
Note: VPo regression in the paper: log VPo vs log BoW; the size-index reference follows the Stephan-series basal-Insectivora method. Pongo (VPo=4300) carries no paper species name in the CSV -> expected csv-only (a post-1985 addition).
